TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_David_Woodard, title = David_Woodard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Woodard} }

S.FORM: == David Woodard == Mntucing hngkawas 1964 idas 4 jiyax 6 ka David James Woodard (/'wʊdɑːrd/) ga, empklaw ka hiya. Woodard ka Amirika cweyswey na rmirih sediq.
S.PHON: == da*id woodaɾd == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka da*id ɟaməs woodaɾd (/'w*d**ɾd/) ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. woodaɾd ka amiɾika ʦwəswə na ɾmiɾiħ sədiq.
S.FORM: == David Woodard == Mntucing hngkawas 1964 idas 4 jiyax 6 ka David James Woodard (/'wʊdɑːrd/) ga, empklaw ka hiya. Woodard ka Amirika cweyswey na rmirih sediq.
S.PHON: == da*id woodaɾd == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka da*id ɟaməs woodaɾd (/'w*d**ɾd/) ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. woodaɾd ka amiɾika ʦwəswə na ɾmiɾiħ sədiq.
